text:
The unit price is 52.12. Now I'll calculate the total cost for 85 units with a 10% bulk discount using the bulk_order_total tool.
<tool_call_answer>[{"name": "bulk_order_total", "arguments": {"unit_price": "$var1.output_0$", "quantity": 85, "bulk_discount_percent": 10}, "label": "$var2"}]</tool_call_answer>
